name: ent-semantic-notes
description: semantic notes example using ent and pgvector

scripts.codegen: npm run db:up && LOCAL_SCRIPT_PATH=true LOCAL_AUTO_SCHEMA=true go run ../../tsent/main.go codegen
scripts.upgrade: npm run db:up && LOCAL_SCRIPT_PATH=true LOCAL_AUTO_SCHEMA=true go run ../../tsent/main.go upgrade
